title: Cosy Juicy Turkish Mincemeat Lahmacun
description: A vegan-friendly Turkish dish featuring mincemeat and tagine-cook method, perfect for a winey and juicy brunch mood, this lahmacun is a twist on traditional recipes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the mushroom mincemeat, tomato paste, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Roll out the lahmacun dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Spoon the mincemeat mixture onto the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling to form a crust.
Place the lahmacun on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
